title: pelargonium longicaule
intro: Pelargonium longicaule, also known as Long-leaved Geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium longicaule include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in essential oil form, to harness its medicinal properties.
